businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest internet platform — Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (fintech), Garena (gaming) tri-pillar model
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited is a global consumer internet company operating in Southeast Asia, Latin America, and beyond. Runs Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (digital finance), and Garena (gaming). FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4% YoY), net income $1.58B (+255%). Friday close $86.00 (+0.99%). YTD -32% plunge. RSI 31 near oversold. Simply Wall St: fundamentals solid but price failing to reflect value.
howTheyMakeMoney: Garena — Free Fire in-game purchases, licensing
keyProducts: Shopee — Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce platform
SeaMoney — Digital wallet and lending services
Free Fire — Globally popular battle royale game
Shopee AI Live Commerce — AI-powered shopping experience

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reasonable for growth stock. Cheap vs e-commerce peers

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2026 EPS improvement expected. Attractive relative to growth

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Margin compression from e-commerce investment but profitable

growthDrivers.title: Simply Wall St: Fundamentals Solid Despite YTD -32% Decline
growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/13): Post-selloff valuation check. Revenue +36%, FCF $4.5B, Forward P/E 22x — price failing to reflect fundamentals.

growthDrivers.title: Seeking Alpha: Buy at $136 Target — +42% Upside
growthDrivers.description: Seeking Alpha (3/10): Short-term margin compression is long-term moat investment. Buy at $95, target $136 with +42% upside.

growthDrivers.title: Shopee AI Live Commerce Test — New GMV Driver
growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/7): Shopee testing AI live commerce with NBA All-Star Metta World Peace. AI-powered shopping experience expected to boost conversion rates.

growthDrivers.title: Southeast Asian Digital Economy Growth — Structural Tailwind
growthDrivers.description: 700M population with rising digital penetration. E-commerce + fintech + gaming tri-ecosystem riding structural growth wave.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce (Shopee) + fintech (SeaMoney) + gaming (Garena) triangular ecosystem. 'Amazon of the East' positioning.

moats.description: Shopee leads in GMV across Southeast Asia. Self-built logistics network.
700M SE Asian population, LatAm expansion. Young digital native market.

competitors.name: Lazada (Alibaba)
competitors.detail: SE Asia e-commerce #2. Alibaba reducing investment

competitors.name: TikTok Shop
competitors.detail: Social commerce offensive. Rapidly penetrating SE Asia

competitors.name: MercadoLibre
competitors.detail: LatAm e-commerce leader. Direct competitor to Shopee

recentNews.headline: Simply Wall St: SE Valuation Check After YTD -32% Decline
recentNews.significance: Deepening gap between fundamentals and price. Entering oversold territory

recentNews.headline: Simply Wall St: -17.8% Over 30 Days But +16.3% Over 3 Years
recentNews.significance: Short-term weakness but long-term trend intact

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: SE Rated Buy, $136 Target (+42% Upside)
recentNews.significance: Short-term margin compression is long-term moat investment. Buying opportunity

recentNews.headline: Sea Limited Q4 2025 Results — Revenue +36%, Net Income +255%
recentNews.significance: Strong FY2025 overall results. E-commerce margin compression guidance triggered selloff

recentNews.headline: Shopee AI Live Commerce Test with NBA Star
recentNews.significance: AI-powered shopping innovation. Expected conversion rate improvement

analystOpinions.notableComment: Strong Buy consensus from 11 analysts. Average target $179.54 — +109% upside from current price. Zero sell ratings. Extreme gap between Wall Street and market price.

risks.title: E-commerce Margin Compression — 2026 Flat EBITDA Guidance
risks.description: Shopee logistics and subsidy investment expansion pressuring e-commerce margins. 2026 EBITDA growth limited by guidance.

risks.title: TikTok Shop Competition — SE Asia Social Commerce Offensive
risks.description: TikTok Shop rapidly penetrating SE Asian e-commerce market. Price and subsidy war intensifying.

risks.title: Garena Gaming Revenue Slowdown
risks.description: Free Fire growth plateauing. Gaming segment revenue declining. Needs new hit title.

risks.title: Short Interest at 6.44% — Rising Bear Bets
risks.description: Short interest increasing month-over-month. Potential for short squeeze but reflects bearish sentiment.

risks.title: Price Trend Deterioration — 52W -33.65%, 42% Below 200-day SMA
risks.description: Significantly below 200-day SMA ($148.41). Strong technical downtrend.

buyReasons.title: Forward P/E 22x — Extreme Undervaluation vs Growth
buyReasons.rationale: A 36% growth company at Forward P/E 22x. PEG 1.28 is discounted vs peers. Half the P/E of e-commerce peer MercadoLibre (60+).

buyReasons.title: Analyst Target $179.54 — +109% Above Current Price
buyReasons.rationale: 10 of 11 analysts rate Buy. Even the lowest target of $120 is +40% above current. Extreme gap between consensus and market price.

buyReasons.title: RSI 31 — Entering Oversold Territory
buyReasons.rationale: RSI near 30 is a historical reversal signal. Technical bounce expected after YTD -32% selloff.

buyReasons.title: FCF $4.51B + Cash $10.57B — Financial Stability
buyReasons.rationale: Net cash $7.24B ($12.29/share). Cash position alone represents 14% of current market cap.

overallOpinion: Sea Limited delivered FY2025 revenue of $22.94B (+36%) and net income +255%, yet the stock has plunged -32% YTD. E-commerce margin compression guidance triggered the selloff.
Forward P/E 22x, analyst target $179.54 (+109%), RSI 31 oversold — extreme undervaluation vs fundamentals. Short interest at 6.4% also suggests potential short squeeze.
TikTok Shop competition and Garena slowdown are real risks, but structural SE Asian digital economy growth and tri-ecosystem moat suggest the current price is an overreaction. Strong Buy.

investmentVerdict.summary: Extreme undervaluation vs fundamentals. Contrarian buy opportunity in oversold territory. 2x+ upside potential when margin recovery materializes.

threads.hook: Amazon of the East, -32% crash. Bottom? 📉
